title: Pseudo Prose File validator and IO handler with fsync durability
purpose: Validates ProseFileV3 schema objects and provides atomic read/write operations with fsync for durability.
module_context: Exports interfaces for ProseStep, ProseMethodTags, ProseMethod, and ProseFileV3. Includes validation functions for each schema component and IO functions for reading and writing prose files.

steps.content: Check if the input value is an object and not null or an array.
Return true if the value matches the object type criteria, false otherwise.
Construct an error message using the field and reason parameters.
Throw a new Error with the constructed message.
Verify that the input value is a string.
If the value is not a string, throw a validation error.
Return the input value cast as a string.
Verify that the input value is a boolean.
If the value is not a boolean, throw a validation error.
Return the input value cast as a boolean.
Verify that the input value is a finite number.
If the value is not a finite number, throw a validation error.
Return the input value cast as a number.
Verify that the input raw value is an object.
Extract and validate the order field as a non-negative integer.
Extract and validate the content field as a string.
Return a new ProseStep object with validated order and content.
Verify that the input raw value is an object.
Extract and validate the deprecated field as a boolean.
If the since field is present, validate it as a string.
Return a new ProseMethodTags object with validated fields.
Verify that the input raw value is an object.
Extract and validate the id field as a string.
Extract and validate the name field as a string.
Extract and validate the enclosing_class field as a string or null.
Extract and validate the normalized_params field as a string.
Extract and validate the body_fingerprint field as a string.
Extract and validate the prose_origin field as 'manual' or 'llm'.
Extract and validate the steps field as an array of ProseStep objects.
Extract and validate the tags field as a ProseMethodTags object.
Return a new ProseMethod object with all validated fields.
Verify that the input raw value is an object.
Extract and validate the schema_version field as 3.
Extract and validate the file field as a string.
Extract and validate the title field as a string.
Extract and validate the purpose field as a string.
Extract and validate the module_context field as a string.
Extract and validate the methods field as an array of ProseMethod objects.
Return a new ProseFileV3 object with all validated fields.
Check if the file exists at the specified path.
IF the file does not exist, return null.
Read the file content as UTF-8 text.
IF reading fails, throw an error with the failure details.
Parse the file content as JSON.
IF parsing fails, throw an error with the failure details.
Validate the parsed JSON against the ProseFileV3 schema.
IF a project is specified, convert the file path to a relative POSIX path.
Return the validated ProseFileV3 object.
Validate the input content against the ProseFileV3 schema.
Create the directory path for the file if it does not exist.
Open a temporary file for writing.
Write the validated content as JSON to the temporary file.
Ensure the file is flushed to disk using fsync.
Close the temporary file handle.
Rename the temporary file to the target file path.
